title: Phase C 인증 + 후순위 통합
auth_paths: OAuth proxy: OAuthProxyModelClient routes OAuth login token to <base>/codex/responses with chatgpt-account-id (JWT claim) + OpenAI-Beta + SSE Responses parsing — billing-gated API bypass

deferred_in_scope: CI 연동: JUnit XML output (toJUnitXml) enables CI ingestion; the actual CI pipeline config is a trivial follow-up (out of v1-critical path per objective's 후순위).
